WHAT WE OFFER

Our Services

Helium Balloons

Personalised helium balloons in any colour, size or theme. Round, foil, numbers, letters — perfect for every occasion.

FROM £25

Custom Cupcakes

Handcrafted cupcakes in custom flavours and designs. Personalised toppers, themed icing, and beautiful presentation boxes.

FROM £24 / BOX OF 6

Garlands & Arches

Breathtaking organic balloon garlands and grand arches that transform any venue. Fully bespoke to your theme and colours.

FROM £80

Full Event Packages

Let us handle everything — balloons, arches, cupcakes and full styling for birthdays, weddings, baby showers and more.

PACKAGES FROM £150
THE PROCESS

How It Works

1

Get In Touch

WhatsApp or email us with your event details — date, theme, and what you need. Fast response guaranteed.

2

We Create

We craft your bespoke order with love and attention to every detail — every balloon and cupcake made perfectly.

3

Delivered & Set Up

We deliver across London and can set up on-site, so you walk into a space that takes your breath away.

PERSONALISED

Custom Vinyl Stickers & Decals

Made to Order, Just for You

From balloon name labels to party decals, our personalised vinyl stickers are cut to your exact spec — any font, any size, any colour. Perfect for birthdays, baby showers, weddings & events.

✂️
Precision cut vinyl — clean edges every time
🎨
Wide colour range including gold, silver & rose gold

Gloss, matte & holographic finishes available

Ideal for balloons, cups, windows, walls & more

GOT QUESTIONS?

Frequently Asked

How much notice do you need?＋
We recommend at least 48 hours notice, but we always try to accommodate last-minute orders — just WhatsApp us and we'll do our best!
Do you deliver and set up?＋
Yes! We offer full delivery and on-site setup across London and surrounding areas so everything is perfect when your guests arrive.
Can I customise colours and themes?＋
Absolutely — everything we make is fully bespoke. Tell us your theme, colours and vision and we'll bring it to life exactly how you imagined.
How do I place an order?＋
The easiest way is to WhatsApp us directly on +44 7717 436091. You can also fill in the enquiry form on this page and we'll get back to you within 2 hours.
What areas do you cover?＋
We cover all of London — North, South, East, West and Central — plus surrounding areas including Essex, Hertfordshire, Surrey and Kent. Not sure? Just ask!
Do you do corporate events?＋
Yes! We work with businesses for product launches, office parties, corporate celebrations and more. Get in touch for a bespoke quote.
What payment methods do you accept?＋
We accept bank transfer and cash. Full payment is due on the day of delivery — no upfront fees, no hassle!
